skills.name: wechat-to-shopify-blog
skills.shortDescription: Turn WeChat articles into Shopify blog drafts

introduction.en: Turn a WeChat Official Account article into a polished Shopify blog draft with clean formatting, Shopify-hosted images, brand-aware writing, and product-aware internal links.
introduction.zh: 将微信公众号文章转换为结构清晰的 Shopify 博客草稿，自动整理排版、托管图片、适配品牌语气，并插入相关商品内链。

description.en: Filters useful article images, excludes QR codes and promotional noise, uploads selected assets to Shopify Files, and uses Shopify CDN URLs in the draft.
description.zh: 筛选正文有效图片，排除二维码和营销噪音图，将保留图片上传到 Shopify Files，并在草稿中使用 Shopify CDN 地址。

description.en: Reads the store product catalog, selects a relevant product, and inserts an editorial product block with an internal product link and product image when available.
description.zh: 读取店铺商品目录，选择相关商品，并插入带商品内链和商品图片的编辑型商品推荐区块。

description.en: Supports format-only cleanup, light polish, or deeper rewriting with optional research references and FAQ expansion.
description.zh: 支持仅整理排版、轻度润色，以及加入资料和 FAQ 的深度改写。

description.en: Reads shop details, homepage metadata, blogs, recent articles, and products before writing so the draft better matches the business.
description.zh: 写作前读取店铺信息、首页元信息、博客容器、近期文章和商品，让文章更贴近业务定位。

title.zh: 区块、摘要与 SEO 元信息

description.en: Chooses the right blog collection, creates a clean article summary, and prepares meta title, meta description, image alt text, and structured HTML sections.
description.zh: 识别合适的博客区块集合，生成摘要，并准备 Meta title、Meta description、图片 alt text 和结构化 HTML。
